vBRIEFInfo.description: Story vBRIEF for #1595 PR2 current-shape alignment after the 2026-06-15 override.

plan.title: Align codeStructure PR2 with the #1595 current-shape override

narratives.Description: The #1595 current-shape override resolved that canonical codeStructure lives only at PROJECT-DEFINITION.plan.architecture.codeStructure, typed through vbrief-core.schema.json, with standalone files reserved for generated projections only. PR2 must be aligned before merge so it does not introduce a second canonical architecture file or runner-specific projection commands.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. Move the Directive dogfood codeStructure record into vbrief/PROJECT-DEFINITION.vbrief.json under plan.architecture.codeStructure and remove the standalone canonical vbrief/architecture/code-structure.vbrief.json. 2. Type codeStructure in vbrief/schemas/vbrief-core.schema.json and keep any standalone code-structure schema out of the canonical contract. 3. Update the validator, docs, tests, FILES index, and CHANGELOG to treat plan.architecture.codeStructure as the canonical home and x-directive/architecture.codeStructure as a consumer fallback only. 4. Change projectionManifest entries to path/kind/generated/source without task/freshnessTask command strings. 5. Run focused validator/content tests, vBRIEF validation, and task check if feasible.
narratives.UserStory: As a maintainer reviewing #1595 PR2, I want the schema and dogfood record to match the current-shape comment, so the PR can merge without creating a source-of-truth split that PR3 must unwind.
narratives.NonGoals: No deterministic extractor, provider handshake, MAP projection, codebase-map-fresh check, generated headers, or consumer propagation in this story.

items.title: Canonical codeStructure dogfood record lives in PROJECT-DEFINITION.plan.architecture.codeStructure only.
vbrief-core.schema.json contains the codeStructure type surface used by PROJECT-DEFINITION.
Validator discovery and tests reject standalone canonical files while preserving the x-directive consumer fallback.
Projection manifest shape stores path/kind/generated/source and no runner-specific command strings.
Docs, FILES index, CHANGELOG, and completed PR2 record no longer describe vbrief/architecture as canonical.

references.title: Issue #1595: feat(codebase): generate codebase MAP from vBRIEF-owned codeStructure metadata
PR #1642: feat(codebase): add codeStructure profile validator
Issue #1659: Decouple framework runtime + guidance from the task runner

expected_outputs: PR2 codeStructure metadata has one canonical home
projectionManifest entries are invocation-agnostic by kind
validator and docs align with the #1595 current-shape comment
